LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS SEAN MCCLUSKEY AND YU-CHUN LIN MELISSA LIN, TRUSTEES OF THE MCLUSKEY AND LIN FAMILY TRUST'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AGAINST DEFENDANT GORDON GALLIC - THE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED AS TO GORDON GALLIC WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. IT APPEARS PREMATURE TO ENTER JUDGMENT, HOWEVER, SINCE IT APPEARS THAT THERE ARE OTHER DEFENDANTS WHO HAVE BEEN SERVED BUT HAVE YET TO APPEAR IN THE CASE. calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Quiet Title Judgment Following Expiration Of Date For Any "Unknown Defts" To Respond To Complaint Served By Publication Of Summons
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Alex M. Weyand, Esq., Rebecca M. Hoberg appearing for Plaintiffs, SEAN MCCLUSKEY AND YU-CHUN MELISSA LIN, TRUSTEDD of the McCLUSKEY AND LIN FAMILY TURST, dated January 23, 2012 ("Plaintiffs")

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) GORDON GALLIC, JACQUES CSILLAG, MAIRE-JOSE CSILLAG, ROMAIN PARRAULT, and SOPHIE PARRAULT (" the known Defendants"), (b) all persons claiming by, through, under or against the know defendants, (c) all persons claiming by, through, under or against CLAIRE CSILLAG or her ESTATE in San Mateo Civil Action No. 105441, (d) all persons claiming by, through, under or against LOUIS GALLIC or his ESTATE in San Francisco Civil Action No. 270575, and (eO all of the Unknown Defendants.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Brian Momaney sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court grants Judgment Quieting Title in Real Property to Plaintiffs Sean Mccluskey and yu-Chun Melissa Lin Trustees of the Mccluskey and Lin Family Trust, Dated January 23, 2012.

Judgment signed in open court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion By Pltfs For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Ansdwer Of Defts;
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Scott Feder, Esq. of Weyand Law Firm, Tel. 415.536.2800, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFFS SEAN MCCLUSKEY and YU-CHIN LIN's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Answer Of Defendants is granted. No opposition filed. In their answer, Defendants Jacques Csillag, Marie-Jose Csillag, Romain Parrault and Sophie Parrault affirm that they do not claim any right, title, estate, lien, or interest in the subject property. (Answer, 2, 16.) Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Mtn For Judgmnt On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. J. SCOTT FEDER OF THE WEYEND LAW FIRM, TEL. NO. 536-2800 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFFS SEAN MCCLUSKEY AND YU-CHUN LIN MELISSA LIN, TRUSTEES OF THE McLUSKEY AND LIN FAMILY TRUST'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings against Defendant Gordon Gallic - The motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted as to Gordon Gallic without leave to amend. No opposition was filed. It appears premature to enter judgment, however, since it appears that there are other defendants who have been served but have yet to appear in the case. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Susan Crozier, CSR # 4761 = (302/MJM)
